specs.title: TC-M01 | Block images to simulate missing assets / fast loading
TC-M02 | Inject mock API response (Simulated)
TC-L01 | Login page loads with all required elements
TC-L02 | Standard user logs in successfully
TC-L03 | Locked-out user sees descriptive error
TC-L04 | Wrong password shows error
TC-L05 | Unknown username shows error
TC-L06 | Empty username shows validation error
TC-L07 | Empty password shows validation error
TC-L08 | Both fields empty shows validation error
TC-I01 | Inventory page displays 6 products
TC-I02 | Every product card has a name, price and Add-to-Cart button
TC-I03 | Products can be sorted Z→A
TC-I04 | Products can be sorted by price low→high and high→low
TC-I05 | Clicking a product name navigates to its detail page
TC-I06 | Cart badge count increases when item is added
TC-I07 | Cart badge count reflects multiple added items
TC-I08 | Add-to-Cart button toggles to Remove after click
TC-C01 | Cart page displays exactly 2 items
TC-C02 | Each cart item shows name, price, quantity and Remove button
TC-C03 | Removing an item decrements the cart badge
TC-C04 | Continue Shopping navigates back to inventory
TC-C05 | Checkout button navigates to step one
TC-CH01 | Step 1: empty form submission shows validation error
TC-CH02 | Step 1: missing last name shows error
TC-CH03 | Step 1: valid data proceeds to step 2
TC-CH04 | Step 2: order summary displays item and totals
TC-CH05 | Step 2: finishing order shows confirmation
TC-CH06 | Confirmation page: Back Home returns to inventory
TC-N01 | Burger menu opens with all four links
TC-N02 | Logout via burger menu returns user to login
TC-N03 | Reset App State clears cart badge
TC-S01 | Unauthenticated access to inventory redirects to login
TC-S02 | Unauthenticated access to cart redirects to login
TC-S03 | After logout, back button does not restore session
